{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173530A25672BA46FCB9CFC8BB"}"},"total":511},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612726562694939417","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真心好看，主角一见钟情，也不属于没长嘴的那一类，很甜的一个文，真的很喜欢（有种想要当古风小生的冲动），深得我心，如此⊙ω⊙","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":7,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773999330B9CFC8BB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227612726562694939417%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227519551242650012734%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772483241,"group_id":"7519551242650012734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"双男主，会画那么一丢丢画，可能会写点BE，懒更新","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/N68NQmkKAwusmmVK1xrBg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3adb230dbad54f22a7807a78bea3b1d9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533326&x-signature=oVuYC35OpnqKWvkN4m218reGOJ4%3D","user_id":"822897431809735","user_name":"月染长安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"822897431809735","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7519551242650012734","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+无限流】（自割大腿肉作品！！）
齐雾原本觉得以为自己是一名普通人，直到意外降临在自己身上后，他才发现，普通人没有他这么倒霉！！
正式成为死亡游戏npc扮演员工之后：
齐雾：“为什么那边有个男人一直在看我？”
系统：“他是玩家，估计是把你当成重要npc了。”
齐雾：“噢噢。”
过了一会儿……
齐雾：“为什么他凑的越来越近了啊喂！！”
某男人：悄悄靠近，一把抢走齐雾。
齐雾：“啊！”（被偷走）
系统：“放开宿主啊啊啊！！！”

（排雷：非传统好人夫夫，有高要求道德标准的宝贝慎入）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f545ef771cc55d90fafb37d4dc9cc90a","author":"咔咔乱吃","author_id":"","book_id":"7519551242650012734","book_name":"成为了无限世界NPC怎么破！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7519551321574228542","read_count":"43510","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"660908"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"300","tags":"双男主,系统,穿越,无限流,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a61cc4d119b17fc49420791e0fe94fa8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183330&x-signature=Ov%2BmRXMfZVMtJmOoxzHvq7eiq50%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"499629534230732","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"313"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173530A25672BA46FCB9CFC8BB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":51467,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2707},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610854915234431806","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不一样的无限流，看了好多那种惊险刺激的无限流再看这个真的不一样[送心]
整体调调甜甜的，比较平淡，主感情，小雾作为NPC员工所以就没有那种常见的生离死别，小穆实力强大也没有太大的安全顾虑，好像除了最后一个本基本上没有刀的地方，对于我这种喜欢看甜文又怕被齁到弃文的人来说非常友好，小刀怡情，大刀是一点吃不了[飞吻]
以小雾的视角展开所以并没有玩家视角那种惊险刺激，但是甜甜的很安心，两个宝也是十分的萌，小雾想方设法给小穆走后门真的萌死我了[爱慕]小穆每每进本找小雾也是很有趣的[飞吻]
两天一直不停地看完了，刚看完我就忍不住想写了，真的很吸引我，并不是那种披着NPC皮一直做玩家任务，就是小雾上班记(bushi)，比较符合我心里对普通人进入副本当NPC的情况
希望作者越来越好，这本书被更多人看到[爱心][大笑]","text_exts":[{"e":318,"s":315,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773999330B9CFC8BB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610854915234431806%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227519551242650012734%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772043864,"group_id":"7519551242650012734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ya6r1kEOVmfpBH3/9CbJY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f791848634374697a7be77011dc4d86b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533124&x-signature=YRAz2gRdxJtOOPzHksjBAaDQ%2B5A%3D","user_id":"765679534352270","user_name":"捌凌玖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"765679534352270","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7519551242650012734","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+无限流】（自割大腿肉作品！！）
